Errors while computing Layer Stack

The path </Model_1/Instance/Test> is the target of multiple relocations from different sources. The following relocates to this target are invalid and will be ignored: relocation from </Model_1/Instance/ClassChild> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</>; relocation from </Model_1/Instance/InstanceChild> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</>.
The path </Model_3/Instance/Test> is the target of multiple relocations from different sources. The following relocates to this target are invalid and will be ignored: relocation from </Model_3/Instance/ClassChild> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</>; relocation from </Model_3/Test> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</>.
Relocation from </Model_2/Instance/InstanceChild> to </Model_2/Test> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</> conflicts with another relocation from </Model_2/Test> to </Model_2/Instance/Test> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</> and will be ignored: The target of a relocate cannot be the source of another relocate in the same layer stack.
Relocation from </Model_2/Test> to </Model_2/Instance/Test> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</> conflicts with another relocation from </Model_2/Instance/InstanceChild> to </Model_2/Test> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</> and will be ignored: The source of a relocate cannot be the target of another relocate in the same layer stack.
Relocation from </Model_3/Instance/InstanceChild> to </Model_3/Test> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</> conflicts with another relocation from </Model_3/Test> to </Model_3/Instance/Test> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</> and will be ignored: The target of a relocate cannot be the source of another relocate in the same layer stack.
Relocation from </Model_3/Test> to </Model_3/Instance/Test> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</> conflicts with another relocation from </Model_3/Instance/InstanceChild> to </Model_3/Test> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</> and will be ignored: The source of a relocate cannot be the target of another relocate in the same layer stack.
Relocation from </Model_4/Instance/InstanceChild/InstanceGrandChild> to </Model_4/Test/Child> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</> conflicts with another relocation from </Model_4/Instance/InstanceChild> to </Model_4/Test> authored at @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInvalidConflictingRelocates_root/usda/root.usd@</> and will be ignored: The source of a relocate cannot be a descendant of the source of another relocate.
